TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jimmy_Morales, title = Jimmy_Morales, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jimmy_Morales} }

S.FORM: == Jimmy Morales == ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 3, Jimmy Morales, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1969) mrhuw Guatemala ta' misuw hya' ga Jimmy Morales, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Jimmy Morales sa kawas 2011, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. qnxan nya Jimmy Morales maki tay kawas 1989 msqun ki Patricia Marroquín, tehuk misuw qani. Jimmy Morales hiya' ga, sswe' ni Sammy Morales. By the time he was 10 years old, he and his brother Sammy accompanied their grandfather to sell bananas and used clothing at the market in Santa Lucia. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Jimmy Morales == ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 3, Jimmy Morales, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1969) mrhuw Guatemala ta' misuw hya' ga Jimmy Morales, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Jimmy Morales sa kawas 2011, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. qnxan nya Jimmy Morales maki tay kawas 1989 msqun ki Patricia Marroquín, tehuk misuw qani. Jimmy Morales hiya' ga, sswe' ni Sammy Morales. By the time he was 10 years old, he and his brother Sammy accompanied their grandfather to sell bananas and used clothing at the market in Santa Lucia. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == *immj morales~ɕ == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *immj morales~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣuatemala taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *immj morales~ɕ, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mintzjuwaw nja *immj morales~ɕ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. qnxan nja *immj morales~ɕ maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki patriʦ~ʨia marroqu*n, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. *immj morales~ɕ ħijaʔ ɣa, s~ɕs~ɕweʔ ni s~ɕammj morales~ɕ. βj tħe time ħe was~ɕ ** jears~ɕ ol*, ħe an* ħis~ɕ βrotħer s~ɕammj aʦ~ʨʦ~ʨompanie* tħeir ɣran**atħer to s~ɕell βananas~ɕ an* us~ɕe* ʦ~ʨlotħiŋ at tħe market in s~ɕanta luʦ~ʨia. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
